use_cases: Monitoring and visualizing service incident frequency across time periods
Displaying system health status with color-coded severity levels for dev-ops dashboards
Identifying patterns in on-call incident response times across days and hours
Tracking operational metrics in SaaS monitoring and alerting platforms
Representing engineering team workload and incident distribution
ai_summary: Reaviz Incident Report Heatmap is a data visualization component that displays incident data in a color-coded grid format. It maps incidents across two dimensions (likely time-based like days and hours) with red indicating severe incidents (67+), orange for moderate (34-66), and yellow for low severity. The component includes subtle glow effects on lower-severity cells and is designed for dev-ops and SaaS monitoring dashboards to track service health patterns.
